mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (id, username, password, email, nickname, auth_type, social_id, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}, #{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{email}, #{nickname}, #{authType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{socialId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET username = #{username}, password = #{passwordHash}, email = #{email}, nickname = #{nickname}, auth_type = #{authType, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, social_id = #{socialId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM users WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=com.kidspoint.api.config.UUIDTypeHandler}
